objective: Bootstrap Remote MCP live operator keys into the local gitignored vault, document the procedure, align the operator client with the live Stage B/C bridge protocol, and preserve no-secret live readiness evidence.
scope_boundary: Update Remote MCP operator runbooks, environment registry, service/feature/data registries, backlog/progress mirrors, issue #385 planning/validation/closeout artifacts, no-secret evidence, generated graph/wiki artifacts, and focused thin-client bridge protocol support.
Store secret values only in the gitignored `.env.shared` vault and local LaunchAgent runtime environment.
Use live e2e preflight evidence as the final acceptance criterion without committing bearer tokens, JWT fragments, Cloudflare Access secrets, HMAC keys, raw PII, or raw MCP payloads.
out_of_scope: Changing the downstream local-ai-machine Remote MCP bridge implementation.
Committing `.env.shared` or installed LaunchAgent secret material.
Claiming external SMS, Slack, or email push delivery beyond the bounded HITL relay session-inbox receive proof.
research_summary: Issue #385 follows the completed Remote MCP epic and operator preflight slices. The live bridge is the merged Stage B/C bridge contract on `/mcp/call`, protected by Cloudflare Access plus a signed inner JWT. The operator preflight needed vault material, Access policy membership, bridge protocol selection, and a local bridge listener on the Cloudflare tunnel origin port.

sprints.name: Vault bootstrap and live readiness
sprints.goal: Create/store operator key material, document the procedure, and prove live Remote MCP request/response plus inbound receive readiness from this machine.
tasks: Create issue #385 and branch from origin/main.
Generate missing Remote MCP keys and Cloudflare Access service-token credentials into `.env.shared` only.
Attach the service token to the Remote MCP Access policy and record no-secret evidence.
Add Stage B/C bridge protocol support to the thin client and focused tests.
Load the local Remote MCP bridge on the Cloudflare tunnel origin port.
Update runbooks, registries, backlog/progress mirrors, validation, and closeout artifacts.
Run live connectivity and inbound preflights as final acceptance evidence.
acceptance_criteria: No committed artifact contains secret values, bearer-token material, JWT fragments, Cloudflare Access secrets, HMAC keys, raw PII, or raw MCP payloads.
Vault evidence records key names and status only.
Cloudflare policy evidence records token id membership status only.
Live `operator_connectivity.py --mode live` exits 0 and writes `ready: true`.
Live `operator_inbound_preflight.py --mode live` exits 0 and writes `ready: true`.
Focused tests and Local CI Gate pass.
Final AC: PR checks pass before merge.

specialist_reviews.focus: Identify required docs, registry, mirror, raw evidence, closeout, and validator surfaces for the vault-bootstrap slice.
specialist_reviews.summary: Recommended PDCAR, structured plan, execution scope, backlog/progress mirrors, Remote MCP contract surfaces, runbook, raw validation, closeout, and local gates.

alternate_model_review.summary: Accepted the governance surface and validation checklist for the Remote MCP vault-bootstrap slice.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #385 may update Remote MCP vault/runbook/registry/mirror/planning/evidence/closeout surfaces and focused thin-client bridge protocol support.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Validate locally, open PR, merge after checks pass, and close issue #385.

material_deviation_rules: If any evidence artifact contains secret material, remove the artifact and rerun from sanitized inputs.
If Cloudflare Access or bridge launchd cannot be configured, preserve a no-secret blocker artifact and do not claim live readiness.
If inbound receive cannot be proved without external delivery, preserve fixture proof and issue-back the residual external-channel work.
